blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: England enjoy stunning victory as India fall to record T20 defeat. England take an unbeatable 2-0 lead in their five-match series by crushing India in the third T20 at Trent Bridge, bowling them out for 76 to secure a 125-run win.
